title: Unlock Your Best Self: The Power of Good Sleep

questions.sentence: We all know sleep is important, but do we truly understand how much it affects our daily lives?
When we sleep, our bodies and minds rest and repair themselves.
Good sleep plays a huge role in our ability to learn, remember things, and solve problems.
Lack of sleep can cause you to feel tired and sluggish all day.
Long-term sleep deprivation can weaken your immune system.
Experts generally recommend that adults get between 7 to 9 hours of sleep per night.
